final:
// // This JK flip-flop sets Q to 1 on the rising edge of clk when J is 0 and K is 1, and toggles Q when both J and K are 1.
module JK_FlipFlop(
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else begin
            case ({J, K})
                2'b00: Q <= Q;       // No change
                2'b01: Q <= 0;       // Reset
                2'b10: Q <= 1;       // Set
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q;      // Toggle
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule
